name: DeciLM-7B
archDisplay: AutoNAC (NAS)-designed dense transformer with variable per-layer Grouped-Query Attention
note: AutoNAC-searched variable-GQA 7B; billed as the fastest and most accurate 7B base LLM at launch (up to 4.4x Mistral-7B throughput).
tpsNote: Vendor reports 1,174 tok/s on A100 with PyTorch — not an RTX 4090 llama.cpp measurement

results.notes: Open LLM Leaderboard (v1) TruthfulQA score for the DeciLM-7B base model, listed alongside the other 5 already-recorded scores in the same model-card table

verificationNotes: Confirmed via huggingface.co/Deci/DeciLM-7B (7.04B params, Apache 2.0 license, 8192-token/8K context, AutoNAC-designed variable GQA) — all matching. All five self-reported Open LLM Leaderboard scores (ARC 59.39, HellaSwag 82.51, MMLU 59.76, Winogrande 79.95, GSM8K 47.38) confirmed present on the HF model card. MarkTechPost coverage (article dated 2023-12-14) and independent sources confirm the model was announced via Deci's Twitter on 2023-12-12, matching releaseDate. The 1,174 tok/s A100/PyTorch figure was independently corroborated (batch size 352), correctly distinguished in tpsNote from an RTX 4090 llama.cpp measurement, which is not available for this model. No changes made.
